note: 1inch PowerPod (Delegate Resolver, 0xaccfac2339e16dc80c50d2fa81b5c2b049b4f947) delegate(delegatee) — a staker delegates their Unicorn Power (st1INCH-staked 1INCH voting/resolver weight) to a delegatee. Permission-delegation primitive (ScopeBall core surface). Maps to Permission::ProtocolAuthorization{permission=delegate, authorized=delegatee, is_authorized=true}. delegatee=0x0 means undelegate (authorized resolves to the zero address; a policy can gate on that). C-audit-discovered gap (was absent from the prior version-axis _deployments enumeration).
